summary: Sound Bath feature-completion pass (iter39). Backend: added /app/backend/tests/test_sound_bath_sessions.py with 3 tests — all PASSED. Frontend: full multi-turn Pro/Free flow validated with data-testid selectors on desktop 1920x1080 and mobile 390x800. All 11 review-request checkpoints verified.
critical_code_review_comments: SessionIn.sound_bath is Optional[dict] — un-typed. Consider a nested Pydantic model (SoundBathBookmark) for stronger validation, but not blocking.
SoundBathPanel unmount cleanup useEffect has empty deps and closes over snap.active — the ref value at unmount time is what matters; harmless but eslint-react-hooks would warn.

SoundBathPanel unlock CTA is absolute inset-0 on the panel — it fully covers the preset grid on free tier which is the intended paywall behaviour and mobile-verified (CTA horizontally inside panel bounds).
verified_expectations: PRO: sound-bath-preset-crystal_bowl_bath tap → sound-bath-active-badge-crystal_bowl_bath appears; sound-bath-save + sound-bath-stop-all render in header
PRO: same-preset second tap stops (badge gone within ~2s, save/stop buttons gone)
PRO: switching preset moves the active badge (only newly-tapped card shows PLAYING)
PRO: sound-bath-save → POST /api/sessions returns 200 with sound_bath={preset_key, label}; new saved session appears in Saved Sessions
PRO: reloading, then clicking a saved session with sound_bath re-activates the badge (loadSession → getSoundBath().start(preset_key))
PRO: sound-bath-stop-all removes the active badge
FREE: sound-bath-pro-badge visible + Lock icon in header
FREE: preset grid opacity=0.45 and pointer-events=none
FREE: sound-bath-unlock-cta visible; clicking it routes to Account page (account-back-button appears)
FREE: forced click on a preset does NOT activate a bath (no active badge)
FREE: PRO_PREVIEW banner lists 'Sound Baths' first (Sound Baths idx=13 < Brainwave idx=25)
AccountDashboard proFeatures contains: 'Sound Baths — 7 algorithmic crystal-bowl, chime & gong washes', 'Equalizer hearing calibration (personal EQ profile)', 'Breathwork guide with pulsing haptics'
MOBILE 390x800: panel + CTA render inside panel horizontal bounds
BACKEND: POST /api/sessions with sound_bath round-trips through GET /api/sessions
BACKEND: sound_bath omitted still works (backward compatible)
BACKEND: free user still hits 402 on 4th session even when payload includes sound_bath
seed_data_creation: Registered ephemeral free user TEST_freesb_<timestamp>@example.com via /api/auth/register (auto-logs in via cookie). Created a few TEST_ prefixed sessions during backend test and cleaned them up. Admin created TEST_sb_crystal / TEST_no_sb sessions cleaned via DELETE.
context_for_next_testing_agent: IMPORTANT: /api/auth/register auto-establishes an httpOnly session cookie, so if you register then hit '/' you'll land already-authenticated on the Dashboard (skip the login form). Always close AI Companion sheet first via [data-testid='ai-agent-close'] before interacting with the Sound Bath panel. Preset keys: crystal_bowl_bath, chime_meditation, gong_bath, full_ensemble, aurora_bath, grounding_bath, solfeggio_wash. Saved-session cards use [data-testid='saved-session-<uuid>'] and clicking the item container reloads it (loadSession). Header account/logout live inside [data-testid='account-menu'] under [data-testid='account-button']; use [data-testid='logout-button'] for logout. Backend sound_bath field is Optional[dict] on SessionIn (line 339 of server.py).
rca of the issue: n/a — feature completion pass, no bugs found.
